angles.argument: governments have developed and used drone swarms for surveillance and attacks, so birds are the next natural step for covert ops
recent mysterious drone sightings near government sites and airports look just like birds flying in flocks
birds can fly long distances without refueling, just like advanced military drones designed for endurance surveillance
unexplained bird deaths and erratic behaviors match reports of drones malfunctioning or being hacked
government has history of secret animal experiments for spying, like acoustic kitty, so birds are modern drone hybrids
birds often hover or perch motionless watching people, exactly like surveillance drones loitering
sharp increase in bird populations correlates with drone tech rollout post-2010s
birds avoid radar and weather like stealth drones, perfect for government evasion tactics
